content.en:
For Ye Tian, the first level is not very difficult.

Time passed slowly, and at this time, he had almost comprehended the Dao patterns on the corpse of this Boundary River life, and naturally had enough understanding of his own abilities.

Subsequently, he deduced and finally simulated the other party's ability.

Airplanes!!!!

A ray of light burst out from Ye Tian's hand, shattering the surrounding time and space.

After this trick was performed, he was immediately judged to be qualified by the Half-tooth Ancient Tower and passed the first level.

In this way, Ye Tian came to the second level.

Although the second level is also a test of understanding, it is much more difficult.

The test of the second level is to comprehend a Dao map, which also stipulates that within one-tenth of the realm of the river years, you can thoroughly comprehend it, and if you understand it thoroughly, you can pass the second level.

The rules contained in this map are extremely chaotic and completely incompatible with the rules of the outside world, which are the rules created by the Eternal Master himself, and only apply to the half-toothed ancient tower.

Therefore, one's own realm and understanding of many paths are not suitable at all, and at this time, one can only rely on one's own understanding to understand from the beginning, which is a test of the strength of understanding.

In the second level, some of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords are afraid that they will not be able to break through, but the highly talented Peak Legendary Realm Lord 19 can still easily break through.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to comprehend this Dao diagram.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally understood it thoroughly and passed the second level.

At this time, he came to the third level, which was also the last level to test his understanding.

The third level is the Void.

A figure appeared, and the moment he appeared, he said lightly: "Tester, the deity only casts three secret techniques, observe carefully, if you can learn this secret technique through three observations, even if you pass this level." "

As soon as the words fell, countless power flow routes appeared on this figure, which were easily revealed.

Then, the aura of this figure became stronger and stronger, and at a certain moment, a punch was blasted out, and many time and space were shattered one after another.

Judging from the effect of this figure, this secret art is a secret art that can increase strength.

In fact, at Ye Tian's level, except for the space-time supreme technique and space-time control technique, there are almost no secret techniques that can have an effect on him, and if it is useful, the effect is average.

For example, the secret technique displayed by this figure is actually average, and the strength of the increase is not as good as the time and space supreme technique that can increase the strength.

It's just a test, not a very powerful secret art.

Soon, this figure began the second arcane spell, the third arcane spell.

After three performances, the figure vanished.

Ye Tian must learn this secret technique before he can enter the fourth level, otherwise he will be eliminated.

"This level should be very difficult for many peak Legendary Realm Lords, if you rely on Ping Pong Qi or countless resources and treasures to accumulate to the fourth or fifth level of Peak Legendary Realm Lords, I'm afraid you won't be able to pass this level.

Ye Tian said darkly.

But he didn't panic at all, and after three observations, he almost memorized this secret art, and he only needed to comprehend it for a period of time before he could practice it.

Time passed slowly, and after a period of time, Ye Tian had already practiced this secret technique.

Immediately, he performed this secret art.

At this time, Halftooth Guta informed him that he had passed the third level and could enter the fourth level.

The fourth and fifth levels test the mastery of the Dao, and the more Dao you control, the easier it is to pass the fourth and fifth levels.

Coming to the fourth level, Ye Tian saw a sea of rules.

At the same time, Ye Tian found that his power was imprisoned, and the only thing he could do was to control the power of one path after another.

The Half-Tooth Ancient Tower prompted: "Control many Dao and form a Dao Bridge, you can pass through this sea of rules and enter the fifth level." "

Obviously, if you control too few Dao, you will not be able to successfully reach the fifth level.

Although there are strong and weak paths, even if the enlightened ones are the most powerful ones, it is not enough to have too few of them.

Airplanes!!!!

A kind of Dao power appeared on Ye Tian's body.

With the power of the Dao of time and space, and the power of other Dao, he superimposed it into a bridge, which continued to extend and advance in this sea of rules.

Time passed slowly, and soon Ye Tian crossed this ocean of rules.

In this way, Ye Tian easily passed the fourth level and entered the fifth level.

The fifth level is a bit dangerous, according to those peak legendary realm lords outside, once you can't pass the fifth level, the clone will be directly crushed.

Of course, you can also just give up and leave the half-tooth ancient tower.

But once you enter the fifth level, how many will be willing to give up?

In the fifth level, Ye Tian's power was still banned, and he could only control the power of one path after another.

Abrupt.

An attack appeared in the fifth level void and hit Ye Tian's body.

At the critical moment, Ye Tian controlled the power of the Dao of Time and Space to protect his body.

Bang!!!

Under the blow, Ye Tian's body did not move.

But immediately after, a dense bombardment of attacks came.

As a result, Ye Tian controlled the power of many Dao to bless his whole body, forming a shield of countless layers of Dao.

Click!!!

The layers of shields were broken, but Ye Tian controlled too many Dao, so he could protect himself from harm.

Layers of shields shattered, and layers of shields rose.

After a long time, the attack disappeared.

And Ye Tian also passed the fifth level.

When Ye Tian passed the fifth level, he immediately attracted the attention of many peak Legendary Realm lords.

After all, if you can pass the fifth level, you will be very genius, and you will definitely not be a lonely person.

If you can pass the sixth level, 587 can enter the Half-Tooth Secret Domain.

Level 6.

This level is a little difficult for Ye Tian, because he has not yet carried out the integration of time and space to the extreme, and this level assesses the perception and understanding of the fusion of time and space.

Although it is only used, the fusion of time and space is not at its peak, and it naturally has some influence.

Fortunately, Ye Tian successfully fused the control-level time ancestor and the control-level space ancestor, so he had the hope of passing.

Airplanes!!!

A time ball and a space ball appeared in front of Ye Tian.

The Half Tooth Ancient Tower reminded Ye Tian: "If you fuse these two balls into a space-time ball, you can pass the sixth level, and each assessor has three chances to try, and the time is one boundary river year." "

Ye Tian perceived the time ball and the space ball, each ball was composed of countless time and space forces, including countless changes in time and space, and if the slightest change was not controlled, it would fail to fuse.

Even the Fourth Peak Legendary Realm Lords who have fused time and space to the extreme of their peak, their hopes of passing this level are extremely slim, and not many of those Fifth Peak Legendary Realm Lords can successfully pass it.

This is the ultimate use of space-time fusion, which requires an unimaginable level of understanding and perception of space-time integration.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian couldn't do it, but fortunately, he had a time of Jiehe Year, which was enough for him to pass this level. _
